revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) to last version by Jo-Jo Eumerus
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=January|2=February|3=March|4=April|5=May|6=June|7=July|8=August|9=September|10=October|11=November|12=December|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
